title: VTeamPlus
description: A client-side team management mod. Features custom colored hitboxes for players and loot, anti-friendly fire, and a ghost mode for better PVP.
body:
[![Modrinth Followers](https://img.shields.io/badge/dynamic/json?url=https%3A%2F%2Fapi.modrinth.com%2Fv2%2Fproject%2Fvteamplus&query=followers&logo=modrinth&label=Modrinth%20Followers&labelColor=%230f8642&color=rgb(255%2C%2073%2C%20110)&cacheSeconds=600)](https://modrinth.com/mod/vteamplus) - follow pls :^

VTeamPlus is a client-side utility mod designed for team management and improved visibility in multiplayer environments.

### Features
**- Smart Hitboxes:** Applies custom colors to entity hitboxes. By default, friends are highlighted in green, enemies in red, and specified loot items in yellow. All colors can be customized via HEX codes.

- **Look Vector:** Visualizes where entities are looking. Features customizable styles (arrow/line/hidden), length, and colors (custom or matching the smart hitbox color). Useful for tracking movement or aiming.
  
**- Anti-Friendly Fire:** Automatically blocks weapon attacks against players on your friend list. Empty-hand punches remain enabled to allow pushing teammates.
- Ghost Mode: Players on your friend list will remain visible to you even if they have the Invisibility effect applied.
  
**- Management GUI:** All lists (friends, enemies, loot) and settings can be managed directly through an in-game menu accessible from the pause screen.



### Important Notice
**- Server Rules:** Because this mod provides direct gameplay and PVP advantages (hitbox highlighting, visibility bypass, attack blocking), it is highly likely to be strictly prohibited on many public or competitive servers. Always check server rules before using it. You are responsible for any bans.
  
**- Compatibility & Stability:** The mod is actively in development and may be unstable. You might encounter bugs, unexpected behavior, or incompatibilities with certain other client-side mods.



### Bug Reports & Feedback
If you find a bug or have a suggestion, please contact me directly on Telegram:
**[t.me/infikot](https://t.me/infikot)**


### Support the Project
If you enjoy VTeamPlus and want to support my projects, you can do so on Boosty. Any support is greatly appreciated!
**[boosty.to/infikot](https://boosty.to/infikot)**
